raw.message: 창세기전의 감동은 그대로, 성장은 더 빠르게.

hook.summary: Cinematic transition from a dark, ruined battlefield to a bright, prosperous kingdom.
hook.visual_action: The camera pans across a desolate, smoky landscape before shifting to a sunlit path leading to a grand castle.

scene_flow: Cinematic pan over a dark, ruined landscape with smoke and fire.
Smooth transition to a bright, peaceful kingdom with a castle in the distance.
Final title card featuring character illustrations and app store download buttons.
audience_proxy: Fans of classic Korean RPGs and idle games looking for a nostalgic yet modern experience.
